subcodes.first_line: O thou who livest by the spirit of the Covenant! When the perfumed breeze of constancy and steadfastness doth waft abroad, hearts and vision are opened wide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بروح میثاق نسیم معطر ثبوت و رسوخ چون مرور نماید قلوب گشایش یابد و بصر
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for governments and rulers, @firmness in the Covenant
